title: House generation vanilla
description: This mod adds vanilla house generation.
body:

 ![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e786ebd9bf294b62336b76877836544d3a03b66.png)
## ![ак](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b92a3c2e3475de96a0a3eebd3f93e4c5fdcb6c4.gif)House Generation vanilla mod adds:![ак](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b92a3c2e3475de96a0a3eebd3f93e4c5fdcb6c4.gif)
1. **A hause in the field**
2. **A forester's house**
## ![ф](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4621f940ed460a001a8611bfb0a8057075fbcce2.png) The mod has also been translated into the following languages:     ![ф](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4621f940ed460a001a8611bfb0a8057075fbcce2.png) 
- **English** (Google Translate) _(there may also be problems with translation)_
- **Russian** (original) 
- **Ukrainian** (original)
